name: National Global Strategy Game (v. 3)
description:
Want to rule you're favourite country? Want to discover alternative ways of history? Then, this character is made for you!

Since it's AI powered, you could play at ANY era(even imaginary) with ANY country. Declare wars, make alliances, manage country resources, create new laws, bring up your new ideology or c̶o̶n̶q̶u̶e̶r̶ ̶E̶u̶r̶o̶p̶e̶ ̶.

Limitless version: [LINK]

Note:

  • AI may struggle to manage with variables.

  • AI may be bad at history.

  • Set 'unlimited' tokens for per message.

  • Use more logical API(like OpenAI or any other).

UPDATE 3:

  • Mods now work though chat summary. (It 1000x times better like that!)
